info.title: TeamBattles API
info.description: Public developer API for TeamBattles. Authenticate with an API key: Authorization: Bearer tb_<key>.

post.summary: List matches for the developer's approved game
post.description: Returns matches for the API key owner's approved (bound) game, with legacy cursor pagination. Requires the game.lifecycle:read permission.

200.description: Legacy cursor-paginated result. pagination.cursor is null when there are no more pages.

400.description: Bad request (invalid body, cursor, limit, or date).

403.description: API key lacks the required permission.

get.description: Returns detailed info for one match, validated to belong to the API key owner's approved game. Requires the game.lifecycle:read permission.

200.description: The requested match plus a response timestamp.

403.description: API key lacks the required permission.

post.summary: Forfeit a match on behalf of one participating team
post.description: Forfeits the match for the supplied team; the other participating team wins. Valid only while the match is ACCEPTED, READY, or IN_PROGRESS. Requires the game.lifecycle:read-write permission and a key bound to the match's game. Supports an optional `Idempotency-Key` request header: a retry with the same key and body replays the original response, while the same key with a different body returns 409 error_idempotency_key_conflict.

200.description: The match was forfeited successfully.

400.description: Bad request (invalid body, cursor, limit, or date).

403.description: API key lacks the required permission.

post.summary: Submit or update player stats for a map
post.description: Sets per-player stats on an existing map score for the given mapIndex. Requires the game.scores:write permission.

200.description: The player stats were updated.

400.description: Bad request (invalid body, cursor, limit, or date).

403.description: API key lacks the required permission.

get.description: Returns the creator and accepted team rosters for a match, validated to belong to the API key owner's approved game. Requires the game.lifecycle:read permission.

200.description: Team rosters grouped by creator and accepted team.

403.description: API key lacks the required permission.

get.summary: Read all map scores for a match
get.description: Returns every recorded map score plus the aggregate series tally. Requires the game.scores:write OR game.lifecycle:read permission.

200.description: All map scores plus the aggregate series tally.

403.description: API key lacks the required permission.

post.summary: Submit map scores in a batch
post.description: Submits scores for one or more maps; game-developer scores are auto-confirmed. Requires the game.scores:write permission.

200.description: Per-map submission results. success is true only when every map was confirmed.

400.description: Bad request (invalid body, cursor, limit, or date).

403.description: API key lacks the required permission.

post.description: Submits the score for one map (mapIndex from the path); game-developer scores are auto-confirmed. Requires the game.scores:write permission.

parameters.name: mapIndex

schema.description: Zero-based index of the map within the series.

parameters.description: Zero-based index of the map within the series.

200.description: The map score was submitted and confirmed.

400.description: Bad request (invalid body, cursor, limit, or date).

403.description: API key lacks the required permission.

patch.description: Transitions a match between lifecycle states (validated against allowed transitions). Requires the game.lifecycle:read-write permission.

200.description: The match status was transitioned successfully.

400.description: Bad request (invalid body, cursor, limit, or date).

403.description: API key lacks the required permission.

post.summary: Submit map scores across multiple matches in one call
post.description: Submits map scores for up to 50 (match, map) items in a single request. Each item is independently scope-checked against the key's bound game; an off-scope or otherwise failing item is rejected in its per-item envelope (status "failed", error = bare error_* code) WITHOUT failing the whole request. The response is ALWAYS HTTP 200 - inspect per-item status. Requires the game.scores:write permission. Score submission is naturally idempotent: an unconfirmed map is overwritten on re-submit and an already-confirmed map returns a per-item error_score_already_submitted_by_game, so a retried batch is safe without an Idempotency-Key.

200.description: Per-item submission results. success is true only when every item was confirmed.

400.description: Bad request (invalid body, cursor, limit, or date).

403.description: API key lacks the required permission.

post.description: Creates an ACCEPTED + PUBLISHED match for the API key's bound game between two active teams in that game. Requires the game.lifecycle:read-write permission. Supply an optional `Idempotency-Key` request header to make retries safe: an identical key + body replays the original response, while the same key with a different body returns 409 error_idempotency_key_conflict.

200.description: The created match's ID.

400.description: Bad request (invalid body, cursor, limit, or date).

403.description: API key lacks the required permission.

get.description: Returns the static public game catalog and objective definitions. Requires a valid API key, but no additional permission scope.

200.description: Public game catalog.

get.description: Returns playlists from the static public game definition for the requested game ID. Playlist IDs are game-scoped, so shared slugs such as standard are not resolved globally.

200.description: Public game playlist list.

get.description: Returns active, public, non-disabled organizations ranked from active, enabled, non-private team stats. Requires orgs.profile:read.

200.description: Organization leaderboard.

400.description: Bad request (invalid body, cursor, limit, or date).

403.description: API key lacks the required permission.

get.description: Returns an organization's rank for the requested leaderboard filters. Organization stats are computed from active, enabled, non-private teams. Requires orgs.profile:read.

parameters.name: identifier

schema.description: Organization slug or Convex organization ID.

parameters.description: Organization slug or Convex organization ID.

200.description: Organization rank.

400.description: Bad request (invalid body, cursor, limit, or date).

403.description: API key lacks the required permission.

get.description: Returns the global player leaderboard. gameSlug is rejected because player stats are global. Requires users.profile:read.

200.description: Player leaderboard.

400.description: Bad request (invalid body, cursor, limit, or date).

403.description: API key lacks the required permission.

get.summary: Get the API key owner's player rank
get.description: Returns the API key owner's rank in the global player leaderboard. gameSlug is not supported. Requires users.profile:read.

200.description: Player rank.

400.description: Bad request (invalid body, cursor, limit, or date).

403.description: API key lacks the required permission.

get.description: Returns active, non-disabled, non-private teams ranked by the requested stat. Requires teams.profile:read.

200.description: Team leaderboard.

400.description: Bad request (invalid body, cursor, limit, or date).

403.description: API key lacks the required permission.

get.description: Returns a team's rank for the requested leaderboard filters. Private teams return rank null unless they are otherwise excluded from the API leaderboard. Requires teams.profile:read.

parameters.name: identifier

schema.description: Team slug or Convex team ID.

parameters.description: Team slug or Convex team ID.

200.description: Team rank.

400.description: Bad request (invalid body, cursor, limit, or date).

403.description: API key lacks the required permission.

200.description: Legacy offset-paginated result (page/limit based).

400.description: Bad request (invalid body, cursor, limit, or date).

403.description: API key lacks the required permission.

parameters.name: identifier

schema.description: League slug or Convex league ID.

parameters.description: League slug or Convex league ID.

403.description: API key lacks the required permission.

schema.description: League slug or Convex league ID.

403.description: API key lacks the required permission.

200.description: Team bans for the league.

400.description: Bad request (invalid body, cursor, limit, or date).

403.description: API key lacks the required permission.

schema.description: League slug or Convex league ID.

parameters.description: League slug or Convex league ID.

400.description: Bad request (invalid body, cursor, limit, or date).

403.description: API key lacks the required permission.

parameters.name: identifier

schema.description: League slug or Convex league ID.

parameters.description: League slug or Convex league ID.

200.description: League games.

403.description: API key lacks the required permission.

post.summary: Submit or update league player stats for a map
post.description: Sets per-player stats on an existing league match map score. Requires a league-operator key bound to the league and the league scores capability.

200.description: The league player stats were updated.

400.description: Bad request (invalid body, cursor, limit, or date).

403.description: API key lacks the required permission.

post.summary: Submit league match scores in a batch
post.description: Submits scores for one or more maps in a league match; league-operator scores are auto-confirmed. Requires the league scores capability.

200.description: Per-map submission results. success is true only when every map was confirmed.

400.description: Bad request (invalid body, cursor, limit, or date).

403.description: API key lacks the required permission.

post.summary: Submit one league match map score
post.description: Submits the score for one map in a league match; league-operator scores are auto-confirmed. Requires the league scores capability.

parameters.name: mapIndex

schema.description: Zero-based index of the map within the series.

parameters.description: Zero-based index of the map within the series.

200.description: The map score was submitted and confirmed.

400.description: Bad request (invalid body, cursor, limit, or date).

403.description: API key lacks the required permission.

patch.summary: Update a league match's lifecycle status
patch.description: Transitions a league match between lifecycle states using a league-operator key bound to the league. Requires the league scores capability.

200.description: The league match status was transitioned successfully.

400.description: Bad request (invalid body, cursor, limit, or date).

403.description: API key lacks the required permission.

post.summary: Submit league map scores across multiple matches
post.description: Submits map scores for up to 50 league match items in one request. Each item is independently checked against the key's bound league and returns a per-item result. Requires the league scores capability.

200.description: Per-item submission results. success is true only when every item was confirmed.

400.description: Bad request (invalid body, cursor, limit, or date).

403.description: API key lacks the required permission.

post.description: Returns staff members for a league resolved by slug. The API key owner must have a MEMBER+ league role or be TeamBattles staff. Requires the leagues.league_admin:read permission.

200.description: Staff members of the league.

403.description: API key lacks the required permission.

post.description: Returns penalties and/or member cooldowns for a league resolved by slug, with optional filtering. The API key owner must have a MANAGER+ league role or be TeamBattles staff. Requires the leagues.league_admin:read permission.

200.description: Penalties and cooldowns for the league.

400.description: Bad request (invalid body, cursor, limit, or date).

403.description: API key lacks the required permission.

post.description: Returns the game rules and points configuration for a league + game, resolved by league slug. Requires the leagues.league_public:read permission.

200.description: Game rules and points config for the league.

400.description: Bad request (invalid body, cursor, limit, or date).

403.description: API key lacks the required permission.

schema.description: League slug or Convex league ID.

parameters.description: League slug or Convex league ID.

Supply an optional `Idempotency-Key` request header to make retries safe: an identical key and body replays the original season id, while the same key with a different body returns 409 error_idempotency_key_conflict.

get.description: Returns a Twitch channel's chat badge sets. Provide exactly one of the username or id query parameters. The API key owner must have a linked Twitch connection. Requires the connections.twitch permission.

parameters.name: username

schema.description: Channel login name (e.g. ninja). Provide exactly one of username or id.

parameters.description: Channel login name (e.g. ninja). Provide exactly one of username or id.

parameters.name: id

schema.description: Broadcaster id (e.g. 123456789). Provide exactly one of username or id.

parameters.description: Broadcaster id (e.g. 123456789). Provide exactly one of username or id.

200.description: Channel-specific Twitch chat badge sets.

200.description: Ongoing matches for the API key owner.

get.description: Lists the API key's webhook endpoints within its derived scope. Secret material is never returned. Requires the webhooks.manage permission and the webhooks feature.

200.description: The caller's webhook endpoints.

400.description: Bad request (invalid body, cursor, limit, or date).

403.description: API key lacks the required permission.

post.description: Creates a webhook endpoint in the API key's derived scope (personal -> user, developer-app -> game, league-operator -> league). Returns the signing secret ONCE. Requires the webhooks.manage permission and the webhooks feature.

201.description: The created endpoint's id and one-time signing secret.

400.description: Bad request (invalid body, cursor, limit, or date).

403.description: API key lacks the required permission.

delete.description: Deletes a webhook endpoint in the caller's scope, cascading its delivery logs and rate-limit bucket. Requires the webhooks.manage permission and the webhooks feature.

200.description: Deletion acknowledged.

400.description: Bad request (invalid body, cursor, limit, or date).

403.description: API key lacks the required permission.

get.description: Returns one webhook endpoint in the caller's scope (no secret material). A scope/owner mismatch is reported as 404. Requires the webhooks.manage permission and the webhooks feature.

200.description: The requested webhook endpoint.

400.description: Bad request (invalid body, cursor, limit, or date).

403.description: API key lacks the required permission.

patch.description: Partially updates a webhook endpoint in the caller's scope. Re-enabling or changing the URL resets the failure count. Requires the webhooks.manage permission and the webhooks feature.

200.description: Update acknowledged.

400.description: Bad request (invalid body, cursor, limit, or date).

403.description: API key lacks the required permission.

get.description: Returns the endpoint's delivery log, newest first, with native cursor pagination. Pass limit (1-100) and cursor query params. Requires the webhooks.manage permission and the webhooks feature.

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Page size 1-100 (default 25), enforced by the handler.

parameters.description: Page size 1-100 (default 25), enforced by the handler.

parameters.name: cursor

schema.description: Opaque continuation cursor from a prior page's continueCursor.

parameters.description: Opaque continuation cursor from a prior page's continueCursor.

200.description: Cursor-paginated result. continueCursor is non-null even when isDone is true.

400.description: Bad request (invalid body, cursor, limit, or date).

403.description: API key lacks the required permission.

post.description: Re-queues a dead-lettered delivery for a fresh attempt. Delivered, in-flight, or still-retrying (failed) deliveries cannot be replayed (409). Requires the webhooks.manage permission and the webhooks feature.

200.description: Replay re-queued.

400.description: Bad request (invalid body, cursor, limit, or date).

403.description: API key lacks the required permission.

post.description: Rotates the endpoint's signing secret. The previous secret keeps signing for a 24h grace window so consumers can update without missing deliveries. Returns the new secret ONCE. Requires the webhooks.manage permission and the webhooks feature.

200.description: The new one-time signing secret.

400.description: Bad request (invalid body, cursor, limit, or date).

403.description: API key lacks the required permission.

post.summary: Send a test.ping to a webhook endpoint
post.description: Sends a single signed test.ping delivery (no retries) and logs it. Use it to verify your endpoint and signature handling. Requires the webhooks.manage permission and the webhooks feature.

200.description: The test delivery outcome.

400.description: Bad request (invalid body, cursor, limit, or date).

403.description: API key lacks the required permission.

post.description: Delivered to a registered endpoint when a achievement.unlocked event occurs.

id.description: Stable delivery id, reused across retries (idempotency key).

created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp the event was emitted.

200.description: Acknowledged. Return 2xx to mark the delivery successful.

id.description: Stable delivery id, reused across retries (idempotency key).

created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp the event was emitted.

200.description: Acknowledged. Return 2xx to mark the delivery successful.

limit.description: Page size (1-100, enforced by the handler). Defaults to the handler's internal default.

cursor.description: Opaque continuation cursor from a prior page's pagination.cursor.

ListGameMatchesBody.description: Status filter and cursor pagination for listing the bound key's game matches. The game is derived from the developer-app key's bound game (not a body field).

forfeitingTeamId.description: ID of the team that forfeits. Must be a participant of the match.

reason.description: Optional human-readable forfeit reason, recorded on the match.

GameForfeitBody.description: Request body for forfeiting a match on behalf of one participating team.

mapIndex.description: Zero-based index of the map whose stats are being updated.

playerStats.description: Per-player stats keyed by user ID. The map score must already exist.

GamePlayerStatsBody.description: Request body for submitting or updating player stats for an existing map score.

maps.description: Map scores to submit. Must contain at least one entry.

GameBatchScoresBody.description: Request body for submitting one or more map scores in a single call.

mapIndex.description: Zero-based index of the map within the series.

mapId.description: Identifier of the map that was played.

screenshotUrls.description: Optional screenshot URLs supporting the reported score.

playerStats.description: Optional per-player stats keyed by user ID.

GameMapScoreInput.description: One map's score within a batch submission.

mapId.description: Identifier of the map that was played.

screenshotUrls.description: Optional screenshot URLs supporting the reported score.

playerStats.description: Optional per-player stats keyed by user ID.

GameSingleMapScoreBody.description: Request body for submitting a single map's score (mapIndex comes from the path).

status.description: Target status. Allowed transitions: READY -> IN_PROGRESS, IN_PROGRESS -> COMPLETED|CANCELLED, ACCEPTED -> CANCELLED. COMPLETED is not accepted directly (matches complete automatically once scores are confirmed).

GameStatusUpdateBody.description: Request body for updating a match's lifecycle status.

items.description: Map scores to submit across one or more matches. 1-50 entries.

GameBatchMatchScoresBody.description: Request body for submitting map scores across multiple matches in a single call (capped at 50 items).

matchId.description: ID of the match this map score belongs to.

mapIndex.description: Zero-based index of the map within the series.

mapId.description: Identifier of the map that was played.

screenshotUrls.description: Optional screenshot URLs supporting the reported score.

playerStats.description: Optional per-player stats keyed by user ID.

GameMultiMatchScoreItem.description: One match's single map score within a multi-match batch submission.

creatorTeamId.description: ID of the creating team. Must belong to the key's bound game.

acceptedTeamId.description: ID of the opposing team. Required - game-originated matches are two-sided. Must belong to the key's bound game.

bestOf.description: Number of maps in the series (1, 3, 5, or 7).

teamSize.description: Players per team (validated against the game's min/max).

mapPreferenceMode.description: Map preference mode (PREFERRED, VETO, or MANUAL).

GameCreateMatchBody.description: Request body for creating a two-sided game-originated match. The match is created ACCEPTED + PUBLISHED for the key's bound game. Supports an optional Idempotency-Key header for safe retries.

gameId.description: Filter to leagues that include this game id.

DiscoverLeaguesRequestBody.description: Filters and offset pagination for discovering leagues.

teamId.description: Optional team ID to check. The API key owner must lead it.

LeagueApplyEligibilityRequestBody.description: Optional team-specific league application eligibility selector.

status.description: Filter bans by computed status. Defaults to all.

BansRequestBody.description: Status filter for league team bans.

gameId.description: Game ID to list display rules for.

status.description: Target status. Allowed league transitions: READY -> IN_PROGRESS|CANCELLED, ACCEPTED -> CANCELLED. COMPLETED is not accepted directly; matches complete automatically once scores are confirmed.

LeagueStatusUpdateBody.description: Request body for updating a league match's lifecycle status.

type.description: Which record kinds to return. Defaults to all.

teamId.description: Filter penalties to a specific team id.

gameId.description: Filter penalties to a specific game id.

limit.description: Maximum number of penalties to return (1-100). Defaults to 50.

PenaltiesRequestBody.description: Type, team, game, and limit filters for league penalties and cooldowns.

gameId.description: Game id to fetch rules and points config for. Required.

RulesRequestBody.description: Game selector for league rules and points config.

gameId.description: Game ID to list season options for.
Filter seasons to a specific game id.

SeasonsRequestBody.description: Game and status filters for league seasons.

gameId.description: Game ID the season belongs to.

seasonId.description: Filter standings to a specific season id.

gameId.description: Filter standings to a specific game id.

limit.description: Maximum number of teams to return (1-100). Defaults to 50.

StandingsRequestBody.description: Season and game filters for league standings.

mapIndex.description: Zero-based map index to confirm. Must be a non-negative integer.

ConfirmScoreBody.description: Confirmation payload identifying the map score to confirm.

mapIndex.description: Zero-based map index. Must be a non-negative integer.

creatorTeamScore.description: Creator team score. Must be a non-negative number.

opponentTeamScore.description: Accepted/opponent team score. Must be a non-negative number.

screenshotUrls.description: Optional screenshot URLs for the map result.

SubmitScoreBody.description: Map score submission payload for a single map.

MatchDiscoverBody.description: Filters and cursor pagination for public open-match discovery.

cursor.description: Opaque continuation cursor from a prior page's continueCursor.

includeStatuses.description: Only include matches with these MatchStatus codes; unknown values are ignored.

excludeStatuses.description: Exclude matches with these MatchStatus codes; unknown values are ignored.

gameId.description: Filter to a single game by id.

scheduledAfter.description: ISO 8601; only matches scheduled at or after this time.

scheduledBefore.description: ISO 8601; only matches scheduled at or before this time.

createdAfter.description: ISO 8601; only matches created at or after this time.

createdBefore.description: ISO 8601; only matches created at or before this time.

opponentId.description: Filter to matches against this opponent team (team id or slug).

MatchesRequestBody.description: Filters and cursor pagination for listing matches.

url.description: HTTPS endpoint URL. Private/loopback/metadata hosts are rejected.

events.description: Subscribed event tokens: exact catalog names (e.g. match.completed) or family wildcards (e.g. match.*). At least one required.

label.description: Optional human label for the endpoint.

CreateWebhookBody.description: Create a webhook endpoint in the caller's scope.

events.description: Replacement event token list (at least one when present).

isActive.description: Enable/disable the endpoint. Re-enabling resets the failure count.

UpdateWebhookBody.description: Partial update of a webhook endpoint.

LeagueGameAddedPayload.description: A game was added to a league.

LeagueGameRemovedPayload.description: A game was removed from a league.

LeagueTeamApprovedPayload.description: A league team application was approved.

LeagueTeamDeniedPayload.description: A league team application was denied.

MatchCompletedPayload.description: A match completed with a result.

OrganizationUnbannedPayload.description: An organization user ban was revoked.

OrganizationUserBannedPayload.description: A user was banned from an organization.

TeamJoinedPayload.description: A team joined a match or league.

TeamLeftPayload.description: A team left a match or league.

gameMode.description: Game mode identifier (from the match's gameModeId).

bestOf.description: Number of maps in the series (1, 3, 5, or 7).

GameMatch.description: Match as returned by the game-developer endpoints (includes scores, omits the game object).

id.description: Team ID.

Team.description: A team participating in a match.

error.description: Stable machine-readable error code (e.g. error_api_key_invalid). Treat this, not the message, as the programmatic contract.

details.description: Optional human-readable explanation. Often absent on auth/permission errors.

GameMatchDetailResponse.description: Envelope for GET /game/matches/{matchId}: the match plus a response timestamp.

gameId.description: Game ID the match belongs to.

gameMode.description: Game mode identifier (from the match's gameModeId).

bestOf.description: Number of maps in the series (1, 3, 5, or 7).

winnerTeamId.description: Winning team ID once the match completes.

loserTeamId.description: Losing team ID once the match completes.

leagueId.description: League this match belongs to, if any (SP-7 league wave).

leagueSeasonId.description: League season this match belongs to, if any.

GameMatchDetail.description: Detailed match payload returned inside the game-developer match-detail response.

GameDetailTeam.description: A team as embedded in the game-developer match-detail response ({ _id, name, tag }).

forfeitedByTeamId.description: ID of the team that forfeited.

GameForfeitResponse.description: Result of a successful match forfeit.

mapIndex.description: Index of the map whose stats were updated.

GamePlayerStatsResponse.description: Result of a successful player-stats update.

creatorTeamId.description: ID of the team that created the match.

acceptedTeamId.description: ID of the team that accepted the match, or null if unaccepted.

acceptedRoster.description: Players on the accepted team (empty when unaccepted).

GameMatchRostersResponse.description: Team rosters for a match, grouped by creator and accepted team.

teamId.description: ID of the team the player belongs to.

username.description: Player's username, or null if unset.

name.description: Player's display name, or null if unset.

isCheckedIn.description: Whether the player has checked in for the match.

GameRosterPlayer.description: A single player entry on a match roster.

scores.description: All recorded map scores for the match.

GameScoresResponse.description: All map scores for a match plus the aggregate series tally.

mapIndex.description: Zero-based index of the map within the series.

mapId.description: Identifier of the map that was played.

playerStats.description: Per-player stats keyed by user ID, or null when none recorded.

GameScore.description: A single map score as returned when reading scores.

creatorMapWins.description: Confirmed map wins for the creator team.

opponentMapWins.description: Confirmed map wins for the opponent team.

GameSeriesScore.description: Aggregate map-win tally across the series.

success.description: True only when every submitted map score was confirmed.

count.description: Number of map scores that were confirmed.

GameBatchScoresResponse.description: Result of a batch map-score submission.

mapIndex.description: Index of the map this result refers to.

error.description: Failure reason, present only when status is failed.

GameBatchScoreResult.description: Outcome for a single submitted map score.

mapIndex.description: Index of the map that was scored.

GameSingleMapScoreResponse.description: Result of submitting a single map score.

GameStatusUpdateResponse.description: Result of a successful match status transition.

success.description: True only when every submitted item was confirmed.

count.description: Number of items that were confirmed.

GameBatchMatchScoresResponse.description: Result of a multi-match batch map-score submission. Always returned with HTTP 200; inspect per-item status.

matchId.description: Match ID this result refers to.

mapIndex.description: Index of the map this result refers to.

error.description: Bare machine-readable error code (e.g. error_game_scope_mismatch), present only when status is failed. Never the raw message.

GameBatchMatchScoreResult.description: Outcome for a single (match, map) item in a multi-match batch.

matchId.description: ID of the newly created match.

GameCreateMatchResponse.description: Result of a successful game-originated match creation.

id.description: Static public game ID/slug.

convexId.description: Active Convex games-table ID, when available for match APIs.

ApiGameModeMapPool.description: Game-scoped map pool for a single mode.

id.description: Objective definition ID.

titleKey.description: i18n key for the objective title.

descriptionKey.description: i18n key for the objective description.

ApiObjective.description: Server-safe objective DTO. UI icon components are intentionally omitted.

id.description: Organization ID.
Organization ID.
Resolved entity ID.
User ID.
User ID.

LeaderboardStats.description: Aggregate stats used for leaderboard ranking.

id.description: Team ID.
Team ID.
League ID.

teamCount.description: Number of teams in the league.

seasonStatus.description: Aggregate season state across the league's games.

LeagueSummary.description: Summary view of a league for discovery results.

id.description: League ID.

teamCount.description: Number of teams in the league.

LeagueProfile.description: Public profile for a single league.

bans.description: Enriched team ban records with computed status.

displayRules.description: Display rule documents for the league game.

penalties.description: Enriched penalty records (empty when type is cooldowns).

cooldowns.description: Enriched member cooldown records (empty when type is penalties).

count.description: Combined number of penalties and cooldowns returned.

LeaguePenalties.description: Penalties and cooldowns for a league.

rules.description: Game rules document for the league + game, or null if unset.

pointsConfig.description: Points configuration document for the league + game, or null if unset.

LeagueRules.description: Game rules and points config for a league.

seasons.description: Season selector options for a league game.

standings.description: Approved teams with season stats, ordered by standings position. Each item is a team-with-stats document plus a computed rank.

templates.description: Rule templates visible to the API key owner.

ApiMatchDetail.description: Participant-gated SP-2 match detail. Lobby codes are intentionally omitted.

id.description: Game ID.

nameKey.description: Game name key for i18n lookup.

id.description: Team ID.

ApiMatchTeam.description: Team summary embedded in SP-2 match reads.

ApiMatchPlayer.description: Player row for a participant-gated match.

MapScores.description: All map scores for a match with a series summary.

ScoreSubmitter.description: Identity of the captain who submitted a score.

ScoreConfirmer.description: Identity of the captain who confirmed a score.

mapIndex.description: Zero-based map index that was affected.

scoreStatus.description: Resulting score status, e.g. PENDING or CONFIRMED.

ScoreSubmissionResult.description: Result of submitting or confirming a map score.

id.description: Organization ID.

bestOf.description: Number of maps in the series (1, 3, 5, or 7).

UserMatch.description: Match as returned by the user/team/org match-listing endpoints.

id.description: Membership row ID.

role.description: Role label within the team or organization.

id.description: Team ID.

broadcaster_name.description: Resolved broadcaster display name or login.

versions.description: Available versions within this badge set.

TwitchBadgeSet.description: A set of related Twitch chat badge versions.

id.description: Badge version id (e.g. tier level or numeric id).

click_url.description: Optional URL opened when the badge is clicked.

TwitchBadgeVersion.description: A single version of a Twitch chat badge.

OngoingMatchesResponse.description: Ongoing matches for the API key owner's active teams.

id.description: Connection ID.
Organization ID.

ApiUserOrganizationMembership.description: API-safe organization affiliation row on a user profile.

userId.description: User ID these stats belong to.

id.description: Team ID.

ApiUserTeamMembership.description: API-safe team affiliation row on a user profile.

id.description: Trophy award ID.

ApiUserTrophy.description: API-safe user trophy. Event linkage fields are intentionally omitted.

WebhookListResponse.description: List of the caller's webhook endpoints.

id.description: Webhook endpoint id.

scopeType.description: The single scope dimension an endpoint is bound to.

secretPrefix.description: First 8 chars of the current signing secret (display only).

lastDeliveredAt.description: Epoch ms of the last successful delivery, or null.

lastFailedAt.description: Epoch ms of the last failed delivery, or null.

id.description: The endpoint id the secret belongs to.

signingSecret.description: Plaintext signing secret. Shown ONCE - store it now.

secretPrefix.description: First 8 chars of the new signing secret.

id.description: Delivery-log row id.

idempotencyId.description: Stable evt_ id, reused across retries (idempotency key).

status.description: Lifecycle status of one logical delivery (endpoint x idempotency id).

statusCode.description: Last HTTP response status, or null.

nextAttemptAt.description: Epoch ms of the next scheduled retry, or null.

deliveredAt.description: Epoch ms of successful delivery, or null.

WebhookTestResult.description: Outcome of a single test.ping delivery.

ApiErrorCode.description: Stable machine-readable API error code (documentation enum).

id.description: Stable delivery id, reused across retries (idempotency key).

event.description: The event name from the TeamBattles catalog.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp the event was emitted.

WebhookEnvelope.description: Shared envelope for all TeamBattles webhook deliveries.

ApiKeyAuth.description: Send your API key as: Authorization: Bearer tb_<key>
